text.message: if yellow take street and army is over
Black - any reason you didn’t plow me on the 5-4-11?
I don’t mean that to be rude - just when I saw you road build I thought that spot was done for
you can go the other way also
ah you mean the vip road?
Idk what you mean by vip road. Just that you could’ve taken that spot from me and it would’ve hurt my road prospects and block an easy settlement
I feel that lol. Have missed moves plenty of times
Alright I’m not getting road nor army. So don’t forget about blocking others when you all roll 7s 😂
Poexania I didn’t know that street did that 😂
blue is most probable to win
How many vp’s yall got red/blue
great game no matter who wins
Maybe not but black has a lot of open settles
